column1: # Declared upstream blast-radius map: upstream file -> the mcfish owners a change
# there lands in. AUDITED against the citation-derived map by
# `tools/upstream_map.py --audit`: a derived owner missing here is DRIFT (the
# declared radius under-estimates reality) and a declared owner with no citation
# or no file is ROT. Absorb drift by adding the owner; never trim a row to make
# the audit pass. By-design exclusions live in upstream_map.exceptions.
